{{Quote|As we say on Mon Calamari, swim where you want, but excrete in your own pool.|Sissalik|<ref name="Ando: Planet of the Walrus Men">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030703ando|text=Ando: Planet of the Walrus Men|int=Ando: Planet of the Walrus Men}}</ref>}}
'''Sissalik''', also known as "'''Slick'''", was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. He was [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] then purchased by an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] named [[Farvakine]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], whom Sissalik later killed by lacing his food with [[Chuba poison]]. Sissalik escaped to [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] and worked as a deckhand on the fishing vessel ''[[Nanda's Luck]]''. After a few months at sea, ''Nanda's Luck'' was attacked by a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] led by [[Pyash Yopayomba]], who bore the title of [[Pirate queen of Ando]]. Sissalik survived the [[Skirmish aboard the Nanda's Luck|fight]] against the pirates, and was handpicked by Yopayomba to be ''Nanda's Luck''{{'s}} new [[Captain/Legends|captain]]. Yopayomba planned to fill ''Nanda's Luck'' with explosives then use it to ram the [[Quantill City harbor]] terminal port, where the [[Portage Moon Festival]] was being celebrated. However, Sissalik found a way to gain control of ''Nanda's Luck'' and crashed it instead on Yopayomba's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], [[Majestic (pirate ship)|''Majestic'']].

==Biography==
Sissalik was a a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and former [[oceanographer]]. During his youth, Sissalik spent some years living on [[Ando/Legends|Ando]]. At some point he was [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and then purchased by an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] named [[Farvakine]]. Sissalik was treated cruelly by Farvakine, and upon realizing that he would die if he did nothing, Sissalik killed his master by poisoning Farvakine's food with [[Chuba poison]]. Sissalick took Farvakine's personal shuttle and escaped to Ando, hoping his former home would serve as a sanctuary. He worked as a deckhand on the fishing vessel ''[[Nanda's Luck]]'', captained by the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Bipopa Bogzider|Bipopa "Bippi" Bogzider]].

While out on sea, ''Nanda's Luck'' was attacked by [[Pyash Yopayomba]], the [[Pirate queen of Ando|Pirate Queen of Ando]]. After a short [[Skirmish aboard the Nanda's Luck|skirmish]], Bogzider surrendered and was then immediately killed by Yopayomba with a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] thrust to his throat. She later explained that none of her crew ever surrenders.

Sissalik was spared due to his courage and once again, he found himself in slavery, and was forced to become the new [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of ''Nanda's Luck'' under Yopayomba's command. Her plan was to ram the ship filled with explosives into the [[Quantill City harbor]] terminal port while the [[Portage Moon Festival]] was being celebrated. Yopayomba hoped to start a planetary civil war between the Aqualish races which would be beneficial to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In return for her help in the plot, she was to be given complete control of Ando's oceans.

However, Sissalik took control of the ''Nanda's Luck'' and instead, crashed it into Yopayomba's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Majestic (pirate ship)|''Majestic'']]. This sparked the [[Battle of Portage Moon]] and turned Sissalik into an Andoan folk hero.
